# cortex_aws_integration_configuration (Resource)

AWS Integration Configuration



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String) The AWS Account ID.
- `iam_role` (String) The IAM role Cortex would be assuming.

### Read-Only

- `account_alias` (String) The account alias for the AWS account.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
